by_gap_topology.note: Prospective only — data collected from fam_eureka_snapshot.py runs. UNKNOWN = picks captured before this column was added. 0_CLEAN = no overhead gaps (cleanest short path). 3+_HEAVY = multiple gaps above entry (overhead supply risk).

note: DOUBLE_REJECTION_SHORT gated to HOSTILE-only — all historical data is FAVORABLE/CHOP tape (wrong regime). BEAR_REJECTION_PENDING is the validated short edge (works in FAVORABLE).
